subject: Fermi GBM trigger 150108121 is not a GRB
submitter: Eric Burns at U of Alabama  <eb0016@uah.edu>
body:
E. Burns (UAH) reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 442378493 / 150108121
at 02:54:50.07 UT on 8 January 2014, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to local particles."
